title: Pyramid Circuit
description: 3-round full body circuit followed by an explosive push-ups / jump squats pyramid

exercises.name: Joint rotations
exercises.instructions: Neck, shoulders, wrists, hips, ankles - slow and controlled

exercises.name: Jumping jacks
exercises.instructions: Jump spreading arms and legs, return feet together

exercises.name: Inchworms
exercises.instructions: Standing, walk hands forward into a plank, then walk back

exercises.name: Hip 90/90
exercises.instructions: Seated, legs at 90 degrees, twist side to side

exercises.name: Forward lunges
exercises.instructions: Big step forward, back knee grazes the floor

exercises.name: Decline push-ups
exercises.instructions: Feet raised on a chair, body braced

exercises.name: Superman plank
exercises.instructions: In a plank, lift one arm and the opposite leg, alternate

exercises.name: Good morning
exercises.instructions: Hands behind the head, lean torso forward keeping the back straight

exercises.name: High knees
exercises.instructions: Run in place, knees above hips, arms coordinated

exercises.name: Standard push-ups
exercises.instructions: Hands shoulder-width apart, body braced, lower chest to the floor

exercises.name: Jump squats
exercises.instructions: Explosive squat with jump, land softly

exercises.name: Standing quad stretch
exercises.instructions: Grab your foot behind you, knee toward the floor

exercises.name: Chest stretch
exercises.instructions: Arm against a wall at 90 degrees, pivot the body

exercises.name: Psoas stretch
exercises.instructions: Low lunge, drive the hip forward

exercises.name: Child's pose
exercises.instructions: Kneeling, arms extended forward, forehead on the floor, breathe deeply
